title: Hosanna to the Son
author: Ken Canedo
snippet: Hosanna to the Son, Hosanna to the Son of David, of David; Hosanna, Hosanna. Blessed is he who comes, blessed is he who comes in the name of the Lord, in the name of the Lord, the King of Israel, the King of Israel; Hosanna, Hosanna in the highest, in the highest.

author: Sarah Hart
snippet: My God, my God, why have you abandoned me?

title: Phil 2:8-9
author: Sarah Hart
snippet: Christ became obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross. Because of this, God greatly exalted him and bestowed on him the name which is above every name.

title: The Jesus Song
author: Tom Booth
snippet: Lord Jesus Christ, Son of God, have mercy on me, have mercy on me. Lord Jesus Christ, Son of God, have mercy on me, have mercy on me. Amen.

title: Ubi Caritas
author: Bob Hurd
snippet: Ubi caritas est vera, est vera: Deus ibi est, Deus ibi est.

title: Were You There
author: WERE YOU THERE
snippet: Were you there when they crucified my Lord? Were you there when they crucified my Lord? Oh! Sometimes it causes me to tremble, tremble, tremble. Were you there when they crucified my Lord?

title: Holy Forever
author: Chris Tomlin
snippet: A thousand generations falling down to worship; to sing the song of ages to the Lamb. And all who've gone before us and all who will believe; will sing the song of ages to the Lamb.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
